documentation.file_docstring: Nostr Profile Management (NIP-01 kind:0) Profile events are "replaceable" - the latest created_at wins. This module handles profile event creation and publishing.
inline_comments: Convert our config profile schema to NIP-01 content format. Strips undefined fields and validates URLs.
Convert NIP-01 content format back to our config profile schema. Useful for importing existing profiles from relays.

Create a signed kind:0 profile event. @param sk - Private key as Uint8Array (32 bytes) @param profile - Profile data to include @param lastPublishedAt - Previous profile timestamp (for monotonic guarantee) @returns Signed Nostr event

Publish a profile event to multiple relays. Best-effort: publishes to all relays in parallel, reports per-relay results. Does NOT retry automatically - caller should handle retries if needed. @param pool - SimplePool instance for relay connections @param relays - Array of relay WebSocket URLs @param event - Signed profile event (kind:0) @returns Publish results with successes and failures
Publish to each relay in parallel with timeout

Create and publish a profile event in one call. @param pool - SimplePool instance @param sk - Private key as Uint8Array @param relays - Array of relay URLs @param profile - Profile data @param lastPublishedAt - Previous timestamp for monotonic ordering @returns Publish results
Validate a profile without throwing (returns result object).
Sanitize profile text fields to prevent XSS when displaying in UI. Escapes HTML special characters.
